SELECT asinh(SELECT value FROM test_asinh WHERE value > 0) AS positive_asinh;
SELECT value, asinh(value) FROM test_asinh WHERE value BETWEEN -1 AND 1;
SELECT u.value, a.asinh_result FROM (SELECT value FROM test_asinh) AS u JOIN (SELECT value, asinh(value) AS asinh_result FROM test_asinh) AS a ON u.value = a.value;
SELECT asinh(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_asinh WHERE value < 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE result_table AS SELECT asinh(value) AS result FROM test_asinh;
SELECT avg(asinh(value)) AS avg_asinh FROM test_asinh;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_asinh WHERE asinh(value) < 0;
